issue_summary: Changed default non-secure generator to Well19937c and changed default seeds to add system identity haschode to timestamp. JIRA: .
javadoc_before:
/** * Returns the RandomGenerator used to generate non-secure random data. *

* Creates and initializes a default generator if null. *

* * @return the Random used to generate random data * @since 1.1 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Returns the RandomGenerator used to generate non-secure random data. *

* Creates and initializes a default generator if null. Uses a {@link Well19937c} * generator with {@code System.currentTimeMillis() + hashCode()} as the default seed. *

* * @return the Random used to generate random data * @since 1.1 */
